name: bindery-mcp
description: Book authoring tools for Claude Desktop: chapter navigation, full-text search, typography formatting, and export. Works with any Bindery markdown book project.

books.title: Books
books.description: Semicolon-separated Name=path pairs pointing to your book projects. Example: MyBook=C:\Users\Me\MyBook;MyNovel=D:\Writing\MyNovel

ollama_url.title: Ollama URL (optional)
ollama_url.description: If you run Ollama locally, set this to enable semantic reranking (e.g. http://localhost:11434). Leave empty to use fast lexical-only search, which works well for most books.

enable_semantic_index.title: Build full semantic index
enable_semantic_index.description: Set to true to let index_build precompute Ollama embeddings for full semantic search. Only applies when Ollama URL is configured.

default_search_mode.title: Default search mode
default_search_mode.description: Default search behavior: lexical, semantic_rerank, or full_semantic. Semantic modes fall back to lexical with a warning if prerequisites are unavailable.

tools.name: bindery_list_books
tools.description: List all books configured in the MCP server. Call this first to discover available book names.

tools.name: bindery_identify_book
tools.description: Identify which book matches a working directory. Pass your cwd and the server matches by folder name or .bindery/settings.json.

tools.name: bindery_health
tools.description: Check server status: active book, settings, search index, embedding backend, and latest Bindery release availability.

tools.name: bindery_download_latest_mcp
tools.description: Download and unpack the latest standalone bindery-mcp-server zip into BINDERY_MCP_LOCATION. Does not edit client settings; not for Claude Desktop/Cowork (.mcpb install).

tools.name: bindery_init_workspace
tools.description: Create or update .bindery/settings.json, translations.json, .bindery/README.md, and the opinionated Arc, Notes, Characters, SESSION, PREFERENCES, and memory scaffold. All arguments optional — smart defaults used if omitted. Detects language folders automatically. Safe to run on an existing workspace.

tools.name: bindery_setup_ai_files
tools.description: Generate AI assistant instruction files (CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, .cursor/rules, AGENTS.md), Claude skill templates, and the generated .bindery/README.md capability reference from settings. Run bindery_init_workspace first. Skips existing files unless overwrite: true.

tools.name: bindery_index_build
tools.description: Build or rebuild the lexical search index and, when enabled, the semantic embedding index for a book.

tools.name: bindery_index_status
tools.description: Show lexical and semantic index metadata, including stale-status hints.

tools.name: bindery_search
tools.description: Search using lexical BM25, semantic reranking, or full semantic mode. Semantic modes fall back to lexical with a warning if Ollama or the semantic index is unavailable.

tools.name: bindery_get_text
tools.description: Read a source file by relative path, optionally restricted to a line range.

tools.name: bindery_get_chapter
tools.description: Fetch the full content of a chapter by number and language code (e.g. EN or NL).

tools.name: bindery_get_book_until
tools.description: Fetch chapters from a starting chapter through a target chapter (inclusive), concatenated in reading order.

tools.name: bindery_get_overview
tools.description: List the chapter structure (acts, chapters, titles) for one or all languages.

tools.name: bindery_get_notes
tools.description: Read from Notes/, optionally filtered by category or character name.

tools.name: bindery_note_list
tools.description: List markdown note files under the configured notes folder, optionally filtered to a category folder.

tools.name: bindery_note_get
tools.description: Read a single markdown note by path relative to the configured notes folder.

tools.name: bindery_note_create
tools.description: Create a markdown note under the configured notes folder. Refuses to overwrite unless overwrite is true.

tools.name: bindery_note_append
tools.description: Append markdown content to a note under the configured notes folder, creating the file if needed.

tools.name: bindery_character_list
tools.description: List structured character profile files under the configured characters folder.

tools.name: bindery_character_get
tools.description: Read a structured character profile by character name.

tools.name: bindery_character_create
tools.description: Create a structured character profile and update the character index.

tools.name: bindery_character_update
tools.description: Update known fields in a structured character profile and refresh the character index row.

tools.name: bindery_arc_list
tools.description: List structured arc files under the configured arc folder.

tools.name: bindery_arc_get
tools.description: Read a structured arc file by path relative to the configured arc folder.

tools.name: bindery_arc_create
tools.description: Create a structured arc file under the configured arc folder and update the arc index.

tools.name: bindery_arc_update
tools.description: Update known fields in a structured arc file and refresh the arc index.

tools.name: bindery_format
tools.description: Apply typography formatting (curly quotes, em-dashes, ellipses) to a file or folder.

tools.name: bindery_get_review_text
tools.description: Structured review payload: git diff of uncommitted changes plus any regions wrapped in <!-- Bindery: Review start/stop --> markers (works even on committed work). Filter by language (EN, NL, ALL). autoStage stages reviewed files and consumes review markers.

tools.name: bindery_update_workspace
tools.description: Fetch and pull the current git branch, report the current branch versus the remote default branch, and optionally switch branches before pulling.

tools.name: bindery_git_snapshot
tools.description: Save a snapshot (git commit) of all changes in the bindery workspace. Supports an optional commit message, optional push to a remote branch, and remembering push defaults in settings.json.

tools.name: bindery_add_translation
tools.description: Add or update a cross-language glossary entry in .bindery/translations.json for agent reference (source → target term). For dialect substitution rules use bindery_add_dialect.

tools.name: bindery_get_translation
tools.description: Look up cross-language glossary entries from .bindery/translations.json. List all entries for a language or do a forgiving word lookup. For dialect substitution rules use bindery_get_dialect.

tools.name: bindery_add_dialect
tools.description: Add or update a dialect substitution rule in .bindery/translations.json (e.g. US→UK spelling: color→colour). Applied automatically during export.

tools.name: bindery_get_dialect
tools.description: Look up dialect substitution rules from .bindery/translations.json. List all rules for a dialect or look up a specific word.

tools.name: bindery_add_language
tools.description: Add a new language to .bindery/settings.json and scaffold its story folder with stub files mirroring the default language structure.

tools.name: bindery_settings_update
tools.description: Merge a partial patch into .bindery/settings.json without replacing unrelated keys.

tools.name: bindery_memory_list
tools.description: List all session memory files in .bindery/memories/ with their line counts.

tools.name: bindery_memory_append
tools.description: Append a dated session entry to a memory file in .bindery/memories/. Supply a short title and content; the tool stamps the date.

tools.name: bindery_memory_compact
tools.description: Overwrite a memory file with a compacted summary. The original is backed up to .bindery/memories/archive/ first.

tools.name: bindery_session_focus_get
tools.description: Read the ephemeral session file (default SESSION.md) holding current working state. Optionally pass a section name (Current Focus, Next Actions, Open Questions, Handoff Notes) to read just that section. Durable preferences live in PREFERENCES.md and durable decisions in .bindery/memories/. Returns a clear empty-state message if the session file does not exist yet.

tools.name: bindery_session_focus_update
tools.description: Update neutral sections of the ephemeral session file (default SESSION.md): Current Focus, Next Actions, Open Questions, Handoff Notes. Only the sections you pass change; other content and the user-owned PREFERENCES.md are preserved. mode 'replace' (default) overwrites a section body; 'append' adds beneath existing content. Creates the file from the standard scaffold if missing.

tools.name: bindery_inbox_process
tools.description: Read the notes Inbox (Notes/Inbox.md) and return a structured triage proposal: each loose item enumerated with a stable number, plus destination tools (note_*, character_*, arc_*, memory_*, session_focus_*). Read-only — never moves, deletes, or categorizes. After items are routed and confirmed, call bindery_inbox_resolve to clear them.

tools.name: bindery_inbox_resolve
tools.description: Remove already-routed items from the notes Inbox (Notes/Inbox.md) by their item numbers, as enumerated by bindery_inbox_process. Use only after items are routed and the user has confirmed. Item numbers are stable between bindery_inbox_process and bindery_inbox_resolve; other items and the heading/intro are preserved.
